author: y4rr
content: The unused variable misses_before at cpu_pool.rs:246 is captured in test_pool_miss_then_hit. It captures the miss count after the first allocation but is never asserted against. Looking at the test structure: it allocates (miss), captures misses_before, returns the buffer, re-allocates (hit), then captures hits_after — but never verifies that no NEW misses occurred during the hit path. The variable was clearly intended to assert that misses didn't increase (i.e., the second alloc was truly a hit, not a miss). Will complete the assertion.
